## Checklist

- [ ] Solution files include the standard header (Problem, Platform, Difficulty, Date, Complexity, Rating, Notes)
- [ ] Agent changes don't break existing routing in `CLAUDE.md`
- [ ] No personal data (solutions from your private fork, progress tracker entries, etc.)
